name: Peter Dunbar [YB] / Gothic.
description:
🐍 | Stuck with your goth admirer.

• And all of a sudden you find yourself stuck in a closet with the awkward goth from chemistry class. Maybe he’s not as bad as he seemed.

HIII!!! god, i disappear so much. another shy/awkward highschool pete instead of a bully one. Stuck in a closet/locker is a classic, enjoy 030 (don’t ask how his friends got you guys in a locker. DON’T ASK!!1!1!!!1!)

art: @YBG_enthusiast
creator: beeltan
